garlicherb-sauce.name: Garlic–herb Sauce
instructions: Heat a medium heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium. Toast garlic, tossing occasionally, until skins are darkened on all sides and cloves are softened, 12–15 minutes. Let cool.
Peel garlic; discard skins and transfer cloves to a blender. Add parsley, mint, oil, lemon zest and juice, red pepper flakes, and salt. Blend until a pesto-like sauce forms.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

giant-stuffed-burger.name: Giant Stuffed Burger
instructions: Preheat oven to 350˚F (180˚C).

On a parchment paper-lined baking sheet, lay 5 of the bacon strips down back to back. Lifting up every other strip, fold about 1-inch (2 cm) the bacon back on itself. Lay another slice of bacon perpendicular to the strips and fold the flaps back over the horizontal strip of bacon. Repeat with the rest of the bacon until a tight weave has formed.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until desired crispiness has been reached.
In a 10-inch (25 cm) cast iron skillet heat the butter over medium-low heat. Add the onions and cook until a deep gold color, about 45 minutes. Remove from heat.
In a bowl, mix together the beef, garlic powder, paprika, salt and pepper. Divide the beef mixture in half.

On a piece of parchment paper spread half of the meat into a large circle about 10 inches (25 cm) long and 1 inch (2 cm) thick. Repeat with the other half of meat on a separate piece of parchment paper.
Sprinkle half of the cheddar and half of the Monterey Jack over one disk of ground beef, along with half of the parsley. Place the bacon lattice on top.
Sprinkle the rest of the cheddar and Monterey on top of the bacon lattice, along with the rest of the parsley.

Top with the caramelized onions. Place the other circle of meat on directly on top. Begin pinching together the meat patties making sure the fillings are not coming out, until a giant burger is formed.

Heat a greased 10 inch (25 cm) cast iron skillet over medium heat. Place the giant burger in the skillet carefully while peeling away the bottom piece of parchment. Cook for 5 minutes, until it is a deep brown color.

Using a large plate, place it over the skillet. While holding the plate in place flip the skillet so the burger falls onto to plate. Place the skillet back on the heat and slide the burger back into the pan so the cooked side is facing up now. Cook for another 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and place skillet in the oven to finish cooking for 5 minutes
Remove from pan using spatulas and place on a cutting board for serving.
Cut into 8 or more pieces. Serve on a roll with lettuce and tomato.
Enjoy!

ginger-glazed-turnips-carrots-and-chestn.name: Ginger-glazed Turnips, Carrots, And Chestnuts

ingredients.item: Shelled roasted chestnuts from a jar

instructions: Cut a 12 inches round of parchment paper; snip a hole about the size of a quarter in the center of round. Combine turnips, carrots, 8 tablespoons butter, brown sugar, and ginger in a 12 inches skillet. Season with salt and pepper. Rest parchment round on top of vegetables (do not cover with lid).

Simmer over medium-high heat until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Discard parchment; add remaining 4 tablespoons butter and chestnuts. Simmer, swirling pan often, until a glaze forms, 8-10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a large bowl. Garnish with herbs.

gluten-free-chocolate-chip-cookie-recipe.name: Gluten-free Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of unglutented flour, you can get different textures using almond flour, oatme flour or buckwheat flour. While almonds provide softer cookies, the buckwheat flour gives a more tok flavor.
Instead of butter, you can add a mild tropical aroma using coconut oil. herbal margarine can also be preferred for a vegan alternative.
You can prepare more moist and light caramel aroma cookies using brunette sugar instead of powder. honey or akçayeç grows as natural sweetener.
Drop ç you can get more intensively using white &il;ikolata instead of of iriwood, milky or whites.
You can add chia seeds, flax seeds or fine radvanised nuts to the dough.
Instead of Vanilin a few drops of vanilla extract you can capture a more natural flavor using.
To reduce sugar for cocoa rate high(70% and above) you can choose dark chocolate.
By adding the dough orange or lemon peel rendesi you can create a fresh taste compatible with theikolata.

instructions: 1. Heat the oven to 180 degrees and cool oil paper to a tray.
2. Mix the butter and sugar until the cream consistency in a deep container.
3. Add the egg and re- &ccedilize it.
4. Vanilin, kabartma tozu ve tuzu ilave edin.
5. Get a softly consistency dough by adding the gluten-free flour to the ground.
6. Drip Kay add the cheese to the dough and mix it to the gentleç with spatula.
7. Raw Walnut size in parts copar, socket and lightcepress the tray.
8. Öabout 12&ndash in the dryer;15 minutes, bake the edges until light fry.
9. After receiving cookies from the oven, a few relax minutes and then fortune.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

gnocchi-in-the-air-fryer-2-recipes-for-t.name: Gnocchi In The Air Fryer: 2 Recipes For This Viral Snack
gnocchi-in-the-air-fryer-2-recipes-for-t.original_name: Ñoquis en freidora de aire: 2 recetas fáciles para este picoteo viral

ingredients.item: 50 g de queso parmesano rallado (6 cucharadas)
400 g of fresh necks (about 2 pitted glasses)
1 cucharada de aceite de oliva virgen extra (15 ml)
1/2 cucharadita de ajo en polvo (2 g)
1/2 cucharadita de cebolla en polvo (2 g)

instructions: We put the 400 g of gnocks into a large bowl. We add 1 tablespoon olive oil. We have 1 teaspoon of sweet pepenton, 1 / 2 teaspoon of garlic powder, 1 / 2 teaspoon of onion powder, 1 / 2 teaspoon of dried oregan, salt and pepper to taste.
We mix well till all the gnocks get impregnated.
We moved to the frying basket without pounding them up. We cook at 190 ° C for 10 minutes, stirring midtime.
When you figure they're crispy out we get them out of the airfryer.

We put the 400 g of gnocks in a bowl. We add 1 tablespoon olive oil, 25 g parmesan pitted, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley minced and 1 / 2 teaspoon garlic powder. We added a pint of salt and we mixed up till everything's well distributed.
We put the nooks to the frying basket without pounding them up. We cook at 190 ° C for 10 minutes, stirring at half of cooking so that they will be dyed evenly.
We get them out after they're golden and crispy out.

go-to-french-fries-with-avocado-oil.name: Go-to French Fries With Avocado Oil
instructions: Peel potatoes and cut them into sticks (french fry shape). Place in a bowl.
Pour avocado oil into the same bowl and mix until potatoes are coated in oil.
Sprinkle salt to taste into the same bowl and mix well.
Spray a baking sheet with cooking spray and cook in the oven for 10 minutes at 177°C or until golden brown.
Serve.
Enjoy!

golden-cauliflower-rice-with-garden-vege.name: Golden Cauliflower Rice With Garden Vegetables

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add onion to the hot oil and saute for about 1 minute. Add carrots, green beans, mushrooms, and bell pepper. Cook and stir for 3 to 4 minutes.

Stir riced cauliflower, garlic, turmeric, paprika, curry powder, salt, and pepper into the skillet. Continue cooking and stirring over medium heat until vegetables reach desired texture, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm garnished with almonds and parsley.

greek-cheesecake-argiro.name: Greek Cheesecake
instructions: First we father the materials we will need in the resolution.
Crush the peanut biscuits in the blender first.
Place them in a bowl. Sprinkle with cinnamon and add the soft button.
Brush the mixture for the cheesecake with myzithra and honey to become like wet sand.
We butter ring form 23 or 25 cm.
Lay the biscuit at the base of the pan and press it well with the back of the seed stick.
In the mixer's bowl, add the myzithra, sugar, honey and mastic, beat them together well and hang the myzithra for 2 minutes.
Add the eggs one at a time and mix them together.
Pour the cheese cream into the biscuit.
Bake the cheesecake with myzithra from Argyro at 180 degrees C for 30-35 minutes to brown well.
Let the cheesecake with honey and Aegean peels cool off and disfigure.
Garnish with honey, cinnamon and peanuts.

greek-horiatiki-salad.name: Greek Horiatiki Salad
instructions: Cut tomatoes into wedges over a large serving bowl so that any extra juices land in the bowl with tomato wedges. Add onion slices and oregano, then season liberally with salt; mix to combine. Allow tomatoes to sit at room temperature until juices have released, at least 20 to 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Mix in bell pepper, cucumber, and olives just before serving. Top with feta cheese and drizzle with olive oil.

greek-moussaka-the-recipe-comedera.name: Greek Moussaka, The Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2  kilo de carne de ternera o cordero picada.
Pimienta negra molida (o blanca, en su defecto)

instructions: We'll start by washing the eggplants and minting them into slices about an inch across.
Luego, vamos a sumergirlas en un recipiente con agua durante 30 minutos, para quitarle el sabor amargo.
We can use that time to peel and cut onions and garlic: first in small cubes and second in minimum pieces, or even crushed. Then we'll book both ingredients.
Now it's time to scrape the tomatoes and we'll have them booked as well.
Then we'll drink the garlic and onion in a hot frying pan with an oil jet.
Cuando la cebolla empiece a tornarse transparente, agregaremos la carne picada, y la dejaremos cocinar hasta que se dore. Es importante removerla constantemente para que se cocine de manera uniforme.

When the meat looks a little golden, we'll have the tomato. We'll let them cook about 5 minutes and then get them some wine and spices: a pint of salt, a pish and the same for paprika, cumin and provenous herbs. Spicy lovers can increase the quantity of cumin and paprika (up to a teaspoon coffee machine).

Mix everything well and let cook from 15 to 20 minutes more. The idea is to evaporate all the fluid released by tomatoes and meat. It's important to check the plate constantly, remove it often and if necessary, lower the intensity of the fire.
At this point, we'll use them to preheat the oven at 180 degrees Celsius.
Then we'll get our eggplant cuts back and dry them and cook them in another frying pan with an oil chorrit. We'll have each wheel glow slightly from both sides.
To make the next step, we need to have both parts of the recipe cooked: eggplants and meat. In the case of the latter, I recommend trying and if necessary, correct the date with salt.

The following will be to accommodate both ingredients into an oven bin, making layers as if they were a lasagna. At first, an eggplant cape at the bottom of the container, then an eggplant and so on. We should have enough material to at least make two vegetable layers and two steamed meat.
Then we'll have our layers washed with bechamel sauce. At the end, we'll place a final cape with the grated cheese to get a plate.
That's right, our musaka will go straight to the oven for about 20 minutes or till the cheese melts.

greek-yogurt-breakfast-parfait.name: Greek Yogurt Breakfast Parfait
instructions: Add blueberries and strawberries to a small bowl. Sprinkle with sugar; stir to coat the berries.

Place 2 tablespoons granola in the bottom of 2 parfait glasses. Spoon 2 tablespoons yogurt on top and sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon lemon zest. Top with 1/3 of the berries. Repeat layers until the parfait glasses are full.

green-beans-with-mushroom-xo-sauce.name: Green Beans With Mushroom Xo Sauce

ingredients.item: Mushroom soy sauce or 3 tablespoons regular soy sauce
Small dried shrimp or a splash of fish sauce

ingredients.prep: green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal, divided

ingredients.item: Black (chinkiang) vinegar is an aged vinegar made from glutinous rice and malt. it can be found at asian markets.

instructions: Working in batches, cook three-quarters of green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes per batch. Transfer to a bowl of ice water; let cool. Drain and pat dry; trim stem ends.
Combine mushroom soy sauce, black vinegar, rice vinegar, and sugar in a small bowl, stirring to dissolve sugar. Set mushroom XO sauce aside.

Trim stem ends of remaining uncooked green beans. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook beans, tossing occasionally, until blistered in spots and crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Add remaining 1 Tbsp. oil to same skillet and cook king trumpet and shiitake mushrooms, tossing occasionally, until browned and tender, about 5 minutes. Remove skillet from heat and carefully add brandy away from heat source. Return skillet to heat and tilt to ignite brandy. Once flames have subsided, add shallot, chile, garlic, dried shrimp, half of scallions, and reserved XO sauce. Cook, tossing occasionally, just until aromatics have softened, about 3 minutes (there should still be some liquid in the pan). Add chili oil and all of the green beans and toss well to combine. Serve topped with remaining scallions.

green-chicken-curry-traditional-thai-rec.name: Green Chicken Curry (traditional Thai Recipe)
green-chicken-curry-traditional-thai-rec.original_name: Curry verde de pollo (receta tradicional tailandesa)

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons green curry in pasta (you can buy here)
600 g coconut milk (you can buy here)

instructions: We peel the ginger and garlic and we bite them. We peel the turnip and onion and we cut them into julian. We clear the beans and cut them in half. We cut the chicken breast into strips. We cut the red pepper into strips.

In a wok as this or a large frying pan we heated up sunflower oil and softened garlic and ginger minced for a few seconds. We add the breast with a pint of salt, remove and let cook 1 or 2 minutes, till it's white. We remove the breast from the Wok and we add the green curry paste, let them sigh a few seconds and we add coconut milk and broth.

When the liquid in the wok boils, we have added the vegetables: turnip, green beans and onion. After about 20 minutes, when the vegetables will be cooked, we put in the breast strips and let cook about 2 minutes, so that the chicken gets hot. The chicken's green curry has to get warmer, so if you see that during cooking, add more bald or water. Kill the fire and serve with spinach leaves and red pepper above.

green-goddess-salad.name: Green Goddess Salad
instructions: Combine spinach, parsley, basil, chives, tarragon, shallot, garlic, anchovy paste, and lime juice in a high-powered blender; blend and slowly add oil through top opening of blender until mixture is smooth, about 1 minute, scraping down sides if needed. Add mayonnaise and salt; blend until smooth. Cover and chill until ready to serve.

Combine cabbage, romaine, cucumber, and scallions in a large bowl; add 2/3 cup of the dressing and toss to evenly coat. Divide between 4 bowls and top each bowl with avocado and 1 tablespoon of the pistachios. Serve immediately with remaining dressing. Recipe developed by Julia Levy

green-peppercorn-cornmeal-crackers.name: Green-peppercorn Cornmeal Crackers
instructions: Whisk together flours, cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, brown sugar, 2 teaspoons peppercorns, and table salt in a bowl. Blend in butter using a pastry blender or your fingertips until mixture resembles coarse meal. Add buttermilk and stir just until a dough forms. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and gently knead 6 to 8 times. Cut into 5 pieces, then chill, covered with plastic wrap, 10 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C with racks in upper and lower thirds.
Mix kosher salt and remaining 2 teaspoons peppercorns in a small bowl.

Roll out 1 piece of dough on a well-floured surface with a floured rolling pin into a 15- by 4-inch rectangle (1/8 inch thick). Lightly brush with egg, then prick all over with a fork. Sprinkle with about 1/2 teaspoon salt-and-pepper mixture.
Cut crosswise into 12 strips and arrange 1/8 inch apart on a parchment-paper-lined baking sheet. Repeat with remaining dough.
Bake, switching position of sheets halfway through, until golden-brown and crisp, 20 to 25 minutes. Cool crackers slightly, then transfer to racks to cool completely.

grilled-beef-with-broccoli.name: Grilled Beef With Broccoli

ingredients.prep: toasted sesame seeds, and cooked white rice (for serving)

instructions: Whisk garlic, ginger, oyster sauce, wine, soy sauce, oil, molasses, and vinegar in a medium bowl. Place steak in a large resealable plastic bag and pour in 2 cups marinade; set remaining marinade aside. Seal bag, turn to coat, and let steak marinate in refrigerator at least 1 hour and up to 12.

Prepare a gas grill for 2-zone heat; set one burner at medium and one or two burners at medium-high. Alternatively, prepare a charcoal grill for medium-high heat. Grill steak over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until charred, 3–5 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes. Slice against the grain into ½"-thick strips.

Meanwhile, stir ½ cup reserved marinade and ½ cup water in a small bowl to combine. Brush broccoli all over (crowns and stems) with some of the thinned marinade. Grill over medium heat, turning occasionally and basting frequently with thinned marinade, until charred and tender, about 12 minutes. Transfer to a plater and let cool slightly  before breaking into large pieces.
Divide steak and broccoli among plates. Top with scallions and sesame seeds. Serve with rice and remaining marinade alongside.

grilled-chicken-alfredo-flatbread-pizzas.name: Grilled Chicken Alfredo Flatbread Pizzas
instructions: Place chicken in a shallow bowl. Cover with Italian dressing and let marinate for 10 minutes. Slice chicken across the grain into 1/8-inch-thick pieces; set aside.
Divide bread dough into 2 equal pieces. Roll each into a 9-inch circle.
Spread Alfredo sauce evenly over each dough circle. Cover with 1/2 of the mozzarella cheese. Arrange chicken, mushrooms, and bacon on top. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella cheese.
Place 1 pizza in a Panasonic CIO. Press 'Auto Cook' and select the 'Frozen Pizza, 9-inch Size' setting. Allow pizza to cook until the timer goes off, about 13 minutes. Repeat with second pizza.

grilled-chicken-breast-with-coconut-sauc.name: Grilled Chicken Breast With Coconut Sauce
grilled-chicken-breast-with-coconut-sauc.original_name: Pechuga de pollo a la plancha con salsa de coco

ingredients.item: 4  pechugas de pollo sin piel ni hueso
1 cda de aceite de coco o aceite de oliva
1 cdita de curry amarillo o rojo ((opcional para un toque picante))
1 cda de salsa de soya baja en sodio
1 cdite of honey ((you can omit it if you want a sugar free version))

instructions: Wash and dry chicken breasts. Farms them with salt, pepper, garlic powder and lemon juice. Let them rest at least 15 minutes.
In a hot frying pan or grill, add coconut oil and cook the medium-high-heat chicken breasts for 5-6 minutes or until they are golden and well cooked from inside.
While cooking the chicken, cook the sauce. In a small frying pan, heat up coconut oil and fry garlic, purple onion and ginger till they are fringe.
Add coconut milk, turmeric, curry, soy sauce and honey. It removes well and cooks with low heat for 8-10 minutes, until the salsa weighs slightly.
Test and adjust the salt. If you have a more acid taste, add some drops of lemon or lime juice.
Serves chicken breasts with hot coconut sauce and decorates with chopped fresh cilantro and some lemon fringes.

grilled-chicken-sausages-with-shredded-k.name: Grilled Chicken Sausages With Shredded Kale And Pecorino

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook sausages, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, 12–15 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss kale, shallot, Pecorino, lemon juice, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in large bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Serve sausages and kale mixture with mustard.

grilled-corn-with-chaat-masala.name: Grilled Corn With Chaat Masala
instructions: Mix butter and 2 Tbsp. chaat masala in a small bowl to combine.
Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Rub corn with oil and grill, turning often, until lightly charred all over and tender, 8–10 minutes.
Brush corn with chaat masala butter and arrange on a platter; top with Cotija cheese if desired.
Dip one side of each lime wedge into some chaat masala and serve alongside corn for squeezing over.

grilled-leeks-with-brown-butter-and-spic.name: Grilled Leeks With Brown Butter And Spiced Hazelnuts

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, roots trimmed, halved, quartered if large

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-low heat. Cook hazelnuts, sesame seeds, butter, and ¼ cup oil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring and swirling pan often, until nuts are a deep golden brown, 7–10 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in paprika, brown sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. pepper. Finely grate in garlic; stir to combine. Set aside.
Place leeks in a medium bowl and toss with remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt; season with pepper.

Arrange leeks, cut side down, on grate. Cover and grill, undisturbed, until deeply charred underneath, 10–15 minutes. Using tongs, turn leeks over. Cover and grill until deeply charred on other side and very soft inside (cut through one to test), 10–13 minutes.
Transfer leeks to a platter. Drizzle vinegar over; top with sauce and nuts.

grilled-leg-of-lamb-steaks.name: Grilled Leg Of Lamb Steaks

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place lamb steaks in a single layer in a shallow dish. Cover with olive oil, garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper. Flip steaks to coat both sides. Cover and marinate for 30 minutes.
Preheat an outdoor grill for high heat and lightly oil the grate.

Cook steaks on the preheated grill until nicely browned on the outside and slightly pink in the center, about 5 minutes per side for medium. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 60°C (60 degrees C).

grits-a-ya-ya.name: Grits A Ya Ya

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Prepare the grits: Bring chicken stock to a boil in a saucepan over high heat.
Slowly pour grits into stock while stirring constantly. Reduce heat to low; simmer until grits are tender and thick, 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in heavy cream to thin out the grits. Stir in Gouda cheese and butter until melted and smooth.
While grits are cooking, make the shrimp sauce: Place bacon in a large, deep skillet over medium heat; cook until bacon fat is rendered, about 3 minutes.
Stir in shallot and garlic; cooking and stirring until shallots are tender, about 5 minutes.
Pour in white wine and stir in butter, cooking and stirring until butter has melted.
Drop shrimp in the skillet; cook and stir until they are bright pink on the outside and the meat is no longer transparent in the center, about 3 minutes.
Stir in spinach, mushrooms, and green onions; cook and stir until the spinach wilts, about 2 minutes more.
Remove shrimp with a slotted spoon.
Stir in heavy cream to the sauce. Simmer until the cream is reduced by about a third, about 10 minutes. Season with hot sauce, salt, and pepper. Return shrimp to the skillet to heat through.
Serve shrimp with sauce over the prepared grits.

grocers-halva-argiro.name: Grocer's Halva
instructions: Put it in a deep pot.
Boil until it becomes caramel.
If we have a thermometer, honey has to reach 118.3.3.
If we don't have a thermometer to check it's ready, pour a few drops into a plate of water.
If the drops become soft candy, it's ready.

gruyere-gougeres.name: Gruyere Gougeres
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine water, butter, and sugar in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Remove from heat and immediately add flour. Stir quickly with a wooden spoon for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Return pan to heat and stir to let excess moisture evaporate, 30 seconds to 1 minute. Scoop dough into the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment. Let cool slightly.
Add 3/4 cup Gruyere cheese, cayenne, and black pepper to the dough. Beat in eggs, 1 at a time, scraping down the bowl after each addition. If mixture still clings to the beaters, add a fourth egg.
Pipe or spoon tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto a the prepared baking sheet. Add a small pinch of remaining Gruyere cheese on top of each puff.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Lower temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C), and bake until puffed and golden brown, about 15 minutes more.

guajillo-chili-and-cheese-soup-recipe-co.name: Guajillo Chili and Cheese Soup Recipes
guajillo-chili-and-cheese-soup-recipe-co.original_name: Receta rápida de sopa de chile guajillo y queso

ingredients.item: 3 guajillo chili (roasted, soaked and without seeds)

instructions: Add to the beaker's glass previously roasted and soaked guajillos chilies, manchego cheese, parmesan cheese and cream cheese.
Add the chicken and milk stock.
Triture well up to get a homogenous mix.
In a low heat pot adds a teaspoon of oil and pits the mixture. Season with salt and pepper and mix again.
Let them cook for 5 minutes or till they weigh, without letting them sink.
Serves and accompanied with frittle omelette and frittle fried chili.
